stemHtml: What are the characteristics of a cold air drop?

options.a: A lower pressure compared to its surroundings. It can be found at higher levels
options.b: A higher surface pressure compared to its surroundings. It can be found at higher levels
options.c: A lower pressure compared to its surroundings. It can be found at surface levels.
options.d: A higher surface pressure compared to its surroundings. It can be found at surface levels
